name: HPE.COM
message: [AI generated] Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE.COM) is a multinational enterprise information technology company based in San Jose, California. Founded in 2015 from a split from Hewlett-Packard, its services include cloud consulting, cybersecurity, AI, and data analytics, among others. It also provides edge-to-cloud platform-as-a-service capabilities. HPE sells servers, storage, and network products to businesses and governmental agencies.
